name: 33"x33" Color Block Abstract Canvas Framed Art Neutrals - Threshold™
description:
The 33"x33" Color Block Abstract Canvas Framed Art Neutrals from Threshold™ brings a modern touch to your space with its neutral earth tones and striking abstract design. Measuring 33"x33", the horizontal painting is framed in a durable brown frame, enhancing its unique appearance. The abstract composition creates a harmonious blend of colors, making it a perfect statement piece for any room. With a sawtooth back for easy hanging, this framed artwork is designed to uplift your decor with its artistic flair and minimalist elegance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
